# Weather Research and Forecasting Model

**Summary**: A numerical weather prediction model used to simulate atmospheric conditions.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-mustapha|Mustapha, 2022]] used WRF simulations to validate meteorological data and understand temperature trends in Saudi Arabia.
